backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the task marketplace backend with task CRUD, user/task profiles, verification/rating logic, and access control via authorization and blob-storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the FAB in HubView is wired to open PostTaskModal for authenticated users with a profile, or trigger the auth/profile prompt flow otherwise.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PROXIIS Vite app, loading Google Sign-In, QRCode.js scripts, and the React root module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component managing view routing (landing/hub/profile), the global AuthPromptContext with showAuthPrompt/dismiss logic, neon grid background, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AuthPromptBar.ts: Animated bottom bar prompting unauthenticated users to sign in via Internet Identity, with a dismiss button and login-in-progress state.
frontend/src/components/CategorySelector: Horizontally scrollable pill-button category filter bar with gradient highlight for the selected category.
frontend/src/components/CompleteTaskModa: Dialog modal allowing performers to upload a completion photo and creators to verify and star-rate a completed task.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: Renders a horizontal scrollable filter bar with three toggle buttons (Newest, Most Urgent, Highest Paying) that update the active filter state via a callback.
frontend/src/components/HubTopBar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar for the hub page featuring the PROXIIS brand title, a collapsible search input, a notifications popover, a leaderboard sheet, and a profile button.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardPanel: Displays the top 10 users from the leaderboard API, showing rank, earnings, tasks completed, and average rating, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/PostTaskModal.ts: Modal form for creating a new task, collecting title, category, price, location, safe spot, Telegram handle, deadline, and a photo, then submitting via the createTask mutation with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/QRCodeDisplay.ts: Generates and renders a UPI payment QR code using the window.QRCode CDN library based on the task's price, displaying the amount including a 10% platform fee.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Presentational component that renders a row of filled, half-filled, or empty star icons based on a numeric rating value.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Card component displaying a task's photo, category badge, title, location, deadline, and price; clicking it opens the TaskDetailsSheet or triggers an auth prompt if the user is unauthenticated or lacks a profile.
frontend/src/components/TaskDetailsSheet: Side sheet showing full task details with actions for accepting a task (with UPI payment redirect), toggling Telegram chat, completing a task, and deleting a task, with role-based visibility for creator vs. performer.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyProgressRe: Displays a vertically auto-scrolling reel of recent completed tasks with a seamless loop animation using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Exports a placeholder UPI ID constant used for payment processing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Custom hook that loads the Google Identity Services SDK, initializes Google Sign-In, and provides signIn/signOut functions along with decoded user info from the JWT credential.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: Custom hook that fetches the leaderboard list of profiles from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfile.ts: Custom hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, including getting the caller's profile, creating a profile via Google, and saving profile updates, all backed by React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a visibility flag when an element scrolls into view, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskActions.ts: Custom hooks for task lifecycle mutations—assigning a performer, completing, verifying, toggling Telegram discussion, and deleting tasks—each invalidating relevant React Query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useTasks.ts: Custom hooks for querying tasks (all, search, by user) and creating new tasks via the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for a dark-mode color theme, and includes animations like a flicker effect for the auth prompt bar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/deepLinks.ts: Utility functions for building deep links, including Telegram profile URLs and UPI payment links with a 10% platform fee applied.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Utility functions for converting between datetime-local input strings and bigint nanosecond timestamps, plus a human-readable deadline formatter.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/views/HubView.tsx: Main task hub view that displays a filterable, searchable list of tasks with category selection, and allows authenticated users with profiles to post new tasks.
frontend/src/views/LandingView.tsx: Marketing landing page with a hero section, features grid, and social proof section, using scroll-triggered animations and navigation to the hub.
frontend/src/views/ProfileView.tsx: User profile view handling Internet Identity login, Google OAuth linking, profile creation, and displaying the user's post history and ratings.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), border radii, fonts (Space Grotesk/Inter), font sizes, and box shadows, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for PROXIIS, recording existing features (FAB wired to PostTaskModal) and a pending new feature request to make the hub page plus button functional for task posting.
